mapper.sql: id, user_id, card_id, growth_stage, is_withered, stage_success_count, total_review_count, review_round, next_review_date, last_review_date, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_plant WHERE is_withered = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_plant WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_plant WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_plant WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_plant WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_withered = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT growth_stage, COUNT(*) as stage_success_count FROM t_plant WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY growth_stage
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_plant (user_id, card_id, growth_stage, is_withered, stage_success_count, total_review_count, review_round, next_review_date, last_review_date, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{cardId}, #{growthStage}, #{isWithered}, #{stageSuccessCount}, #{totalReviewCount}, #{reviewRound}, #{nextReviewDate}, #{lastReviewDate}, #{isDeleted})
